g.text: PHASE 2 — Table B-tree Lookup by Rowid=42 (users)
Page Read Budget — Index Scan vs Full Table Scan

text.tspan: -- Index: CREATE INDEX idx_name ON users(name)
-- Planner: idx_name covers predicate → INDEX SCAN
-- Strategy: descent idx_name B+tree → extract rowid → descent table B-tree
